neurons.name: obv_slope_entry_perf
neurons.description: OBV slope strength at entry — does strong OBV accumulation (>10% slope) produce better outcomes?

neurons.name: macd_slope_entry_perf
neurons.description: MACD histogram slope direction at entry — does rising MACD momentum predict better trade outcomes?

neurons.name: price_vs_200ema_entry_perf
neurons.description: Price gap above/below 200-day EMA at entry — are entries far above 200 EMA overextended vs near/below?

neurons.name: higher_lows_entry_perf
neurons.description: Higher lows price structure at entry — do entries with confirmed ascending support (HH/HL) outperform?

neurons.name: adx_strength_entry_perf
neurons.description: ADX trend strength at entry — do strong-trend entries (ADX>=30) vs weak/choppy markets produce better outcomes?

neurons.name: lr_trend_quality_entry_perf
neurons.description: Linear regression R² trend quality at entry — do high-linearity trend entries (R²>=0.75) outperform noisy/choppy entries?

neurons.name: stoch_position_entry_perf
neurons.description: Stochastic %K position at entry — do oversold entries (stoch<=25) recover better than overbought entries?

neurons.name: pe_ratio_tier_entry_perf
neurons.description: P/E ratio valuation tier at entry — do value entries (low P/E) outperform growth entries (high P/E) in this bot's style?

neurons.name: analyst_upgrade_entry_perf
neurons.description: Analyst upgrade presence at entry — do stocks with fresh analyst upgrades (last 14 days) outperform those without?

neurons.name: short_squeeze_entry_perf
neurons.description: Short squeeze potential at entry — do high short-float stocks (>=20%) with momentum produce better squeeze-driven gains?
